title: REINDEX results in "UNIQUE constraint failed" for generated column
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c0 AS (CASE WHEN c1 IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) UNIQUE, c1 INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 AS (c1 + 1) UNIQUE, c1 VARCHAR(255));
key_bug_features: REINDEX causes UNIQUE constraint failure on generated column
